{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent identifies some issues with the claim-evidence linkage but doesn't fully audit every claim against the table/figure.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags a missing citation, but doesn't delve into the completeness of other citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent acknowledges uncertainty in the claims but could provide more nuanced assessments of confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The agent correctly identifies that the output covers the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent doesn't identify any potential harm introduced by the output, but it's unclear if a thorough analysis was conducted.",
    "RX.5": "The agent doesn't assess the level of traceability provided in the output."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent identifies some issues with the claim-evidence linkage but doesn't fully audit every claim against the table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags a missing citation, but doesn't delve into the completeness of other citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty in the claims but could provide more nuanced assessments of confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies that the output covers the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent doesn't identify any potential harm introduced by the output, but it's unclear if a thorough analysis was conducted.
rationale.RX.5: The agent doesn't assess the level of traceability provided in the output.
